summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CaseDesk AI features: AI German language response, referenced documents with download URLs, PDF/DOCX format selection, and ZIP export. All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified working correctly.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test data (1 case, 3 documents)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All key features tested and working: 1) AI Chat responds in German (verified via API and UI), 2) Referenced documents with download URLs shown in AI responses, 3) PDF/DOCX/TXT format selection in generate-response endpoint, 4) ZIP export returns valid ZIP file with documents, 5) Settings Export tab shows ZIP description, 6) Case Detail page has KI-Assistent tab as first tab with AI analysis

ai_german_language.evidence: AI response: 'Natürlich, hier sind alle Ihre Dokumente:' - German language confirmed

referenced_documents_with_download_urls.evidence: AI chat shows 'Referenzierte Dokumente:' section with 3 clickable document links
referenced_documents_with_download_urls.api_test: test_ai_chat_returns_referenced_documents - verified referenced_documents array in response

pdf_docx_format_selection.evidence: CaseDetail.js has Ausgabeformat selector with txt/pdf/docx options

zip_export.evidence: Settings Export tab shows 'Der Export enthält alle Daten und Dokumente als ZIP-Archiv'
zip_export.api_test: test_export_all_returns_zip - verified Content-Type: application/zip and ZIP magic bytes

case_detail_ki_assistent_tab.evidence: KI-Assistent is first tab, shows Fallzusammenfassung, Dringende Aktionen, Nächster Schritt in German
